CustomField.label: Attempts
CustomField.description: Count of FAILED verification attempts against this OTP challenge (design section 2.3/6.4). Starts at 0 at issue(); each wrong code increments it via VS_OtpService.verify(). Once it reaches the configured maximum (VS_Setting__mdt.OtpMaxAttempts, default 3) the next verify() is rejected with a user-actionable lockout message before any hash comparison -- brute-force protection over the small 6-digit code space (D-013). Optional (not required) so it can carry FLS on the test-context permission set (D-028).
